thinking.text:
The user doesn't seem to have access to the discoverable user tool feature I tried to give them. Let me think about this...

The policy says I should use `give_discoverable_user_tool(discoverable_tool_name)` which I did. But the user says they don't see it. Let me check if I need to provide the arguments properly.

Actually, looking at the knowledge base document I found earlier (doc_credit_cards_credit_cards_(general)_009), it says:

"## How the user generates their referral link
- Provide the customer with this tool and instruct them to run it themselves:
  - `get_referral_link(user_id: str, card_name: str)`
- Tell the customer to pass their own user_id and the exact card name (for example, 'Gold Rewards Card').
- When the tool is called successfully, a referral record is created with status 'NO_PROGRESS'. The referred person can then use the generated link to apply."

I already used `give_discoverable_user_tool` to provide the tool. The user seems unable to use the `call_discoverable_user_tool` method. 

Alternatively, the user mentioned they can use the referral section in the app. That might be a simpler approach for them. Let me suggest they use the app's referral section since they already know how to use that.

Actually, I think the user may be saying they don't have access to the `call_discoverable_user_tool` function in their interface. Since they've mentioned the app's referral process, I should let them know that yes, they can use the referral section in the Rho-Bank app to generate a new referral link for the Platinum Rewards Card. That's also a valid way to refer friends.

worker_attempts.visible_answer:
No worries at all! Yes, absolutely — you can simply use the **referral section in your Rho-Bank app** to generate a new referral link for the **Platinum Rewards Card**. That's one of the standard ways to do it! 

Just make sure your friend uses your referral link when they apply so it gets properly tracked to your account. And remind them they'll need to **spend at least $1,500 within 90 days** of account opening for you to earn the $100 bonus.

Best of luck with the referral! Is there anything else I can help with?
